hero.bio: I build end-to-end web products and train deep learning models. What interests me is deploying real models into production, not just notebooks. I work on system architecture as well as data and inference layers.
hero.currently: Training a sketch-to-3D multimodal model. I work part-time for a startup while continuing my studies in artificial intelligence. Writing more than last year.
hero.quote: "We can be afraid of it or not, but if you are talking about machines taking over the world, I think we are being overly dramatic!"

playground.heading: Draw a digit.
playground.description: A 120k-parameter convolutional network, trained on MNIST, running entirely in your browser via WebAssembly. No server round-trip. The same pattern I use to deploy production inference on edge devices.
